title: 3D Gallery Photography
description: An infinite 3D scroll gallery powered by React Three Fiber. Images are loaded as textures onto planes arranged along a depth axis. A custom cloth GLSL shader curves each plane with scroll force and adds flag-waving hover ripples. Cards fade in and out at depth boundaries and blur at the near and far edges. Auto-play advances the gallery after 3 seconds of inactivity; mouse wheel, arrow keys, and touch also control scroll.
